data.title: XPeng and Xiaomi's EV sales hit record highs in July, unlike Li Auto and Nio which fell compared to June.
data.description: In July, competitors XPeng and Xiaomi of Tesla recorded their highest-ever deliveries in China. However, Li Auto and Nio experienced a decrease in sales compared to June. BYD's performance is awaited following this trend in the electric vehicle market.

data.title: Coinbase's legal chief accuses FDIC of withholding crypto deplatforming docs, vows resistance in opposition brief.
data.description: Coinbase's Chief Legal Officer, Paul Grewal, expressed strong disapproval, stating that they refuse to tolerate the situation. The cryptocurrency exchange filed an opposition brief in response.

data.title: PHINIA acquires SEM, a provider of natural gas ignition systems, injector stators, and sensors for commercial markets.
data.description: Michigan-based PHINIA Inc. (NYSE: PHIN) has successfully acquired Swedish Electromagnet Invest AB (publ) ("SEM"), a reputable company with over 100 years of experience. SEM specializes in natural gas, hydrogen, and alternative fuel ignition systems, injector stators, and linear position sensors for on- and off-highway commercial vehicles and industrial sectors. This acquisition will strengthen PHINIA's position as a leader in premium fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket solutions.

data.title: Bitcoin closes a record month at $115K, setting the stage for a potentially "vertical" August with double-digit gains expected.
data.description: Bitcoin has achieved its highest monthly close on record, marking a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency's history. In the month of August following its recent halving event, Bitcoin typically experiences double-digit percentage gains in price. These trends indicate a positive outlook for Bitcoin investors, with the potential for substantial growth in the near future.

data.title: Recap: 11 health press releases this week - highlights best hospitals, marrow registry expansion, and AI tools from Aetna.
data.description: This week, a collection of significant healthcare updates were shared through PR Newswire. These updates include the announcement of this year's top hospitals, an initiative aimed at increasing the marrow donor registry, and the introduction of innovative AI technologies by Aetna. Released on August 1, 2025 in New York, these press releases showcased various advancements in the healthcare industry. Noteworthy figures and accomplishments were highlighted, reflecting the ongoing developments and initiatives within the healthcare sector. With numerous press releases being disseminated, these updates offer a glimpse into the evolving landscape of healthcare.

data.title: Newell Brands reports Q2 2025 results: met guidance ranges for net sales, core sales, operating margin and EPS. CEO pleased.
data.description: In Atlanta, Newell Brands (NASDAQ: NWL) released its second quarter financial results for 2025. Chris Peterson, President and CEO, stated the company made progress towards its goal of being a leading consumer products firm by achieving net sales, core sales, normalized operating margin, and normalized EPS in line with the guidance given last quarter. Despite a difficult macroeconomic climate, the team managed to achieve significant milestones.

data.title: Avient's Q2 sales at $867M up 2% YoY, GAAP EPS $0.57 vs. $0.36, adjusted EPS $0.80 surpasses guidance.
data.description: In the second quarter, sales reached $867 million, showing a 2% increase compared to the same period last year. This growth was partly influenced by a 1% boost from foreign exchange rates. The second quarter's GAAP EPS was reported at $0.57, a notable rise from the $0.36 seen in the previous year's quarter. Moreover, the adjusted EPS for the second quarter stood at $0.80, surpassing the earlier projected figures.
